context: Layer documentation covers installing Layer, core streaming concepts, command-line operations, and pipeline design. Core concepts describe sources, pipelines, sinks, backpressure, and Kubernetes autoscaling from lag and throughput signals. Installation covers native binaries and Docker. CLI docs cover authentication plus pipeline run/list/log commands. Pipeline guides cover transform stages and restart behavior.

glossary.definition: Scaling Layer workers based on lag and throughput signals.
A sequence of stages that transforms records from sources into sinks.
Container-based local installation path for Layer.
The layer command-line tool used to authenticate, run pipelines, list lag, and inspect logs.
